ON SEPTEMBER 9, 2025, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER TO AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY IT SHOULD NOT BE SANCTIONED $1,635, PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF ADELEMO CRUZ, FOR FAILURE TO CARRY OUT ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. HONDA HAS NOT FILED A RESPONSE. THE COURT ORDERS HONDA TO PAY $1,635 TO CRUZ WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. CRUZ SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER AND SHALL SERVE NOTICE OF ITS ENTRY ON HONDA. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To Dec-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

On September 9, 2025, the court issued an order to American Honda Motor Co., Inc. to show cause why it should not be sanctioned $1,635, payable to plaintiff Adelemo Cruz, for failure to carry out its obligations under the parties' settlement agreement. Honda has not filed a response. The court orders Honda to pay $1,635 to Cruz within 30 days of entry of this order. Cruz shall prepare the proposed order and shall serve notice of its entry on Honda.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ADELELMO CRUZ's Motion To Enforce Settlement And Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Adelelmo Cruz's unopposed motion to enforce settlement as a judgment and for sanctions is granted in part and denied in part; the court issues an order to show cause re sanctions.

Cruz provides a written offer, made pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, sec. 998, signed by counsel for Cruz and for defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc. This signed offer satisfies the requirements of Code of Civil Procedure, sec. 664, subdivision (a), for the court to enter judgment upon Cruz's motion. Cruz is ordered to provide a proposed judgment to Honda pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1312 and then to provide it to the court for signature.

Cruz also seeks sanctions pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, sec. 128.5, subdivision (f)(2). The court issues an order to show cause to Honda and sets the OSC for hearing on October 3, 2025. Honda shall show cause why it should not be sanctioned $1,635, payable to Cruz, for failure to carry out its obligations under the settlement agreement. Honda may file a response to this OSC; any response shall be filed five court days in advance of the hearing date.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
